item.title: Templates
item.description:
Templates

Copy and paste these into other markdown.

🚨 DRAFT 🚨

This document is in development by the owners and has been labeled as a DRAFT.

The contents of this document are considered for advanced system users only, and may require familiarity with Linux and/or the relevant, mentioned application(s).

❗Proceed with caution❗
